nodes.context: English criminal organization based in Clerkenwell, London, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, murder, and money laundering.
London-based criminal gang active in the 1960s, known for violence and extortion.
Jamaican-origin street gangs involved in drug trafficking and violence, operating in the UK and internationally.
Colombian drug trafficking organizations that supply cocaine and other drugs globally.
Drug trafficking organizations from South America, including Colombian and other cartels.

edges.context: The Adams family allegedly ordered the shooting of Frankie Fraser, a former enforcer for the Richardson Gang.
Tommy Adams established connections with Yardie gangs for criminal operations.
Tommy Adams gained an $80 million credit line from Colombian drug cartels.
The Adams family has connections with South American drug cartels for drug trafficking.
